title: radiance-cascades-plinko-typing
description:
A sketch that allows users to type using their keyboard which will spawn balls in the shape of the typed text.  These balls are used in a game of Plinko with each ball realistically emitting light using radiance cascades.

https://github.com/sobecblobec/radiance-cascades-p5js
instructions: Type and press enter to release balls!
